signIn.title: Welcome back
signIn.subtitle: Sign in to continue with the courses on your shelf.
signIn.legalFootnote: By signing in you agree to the Terms and the Privacy Policy.
signIn.errorPasswordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
signIn.errorRateLimit: Too many attempts. Try again in {time}.

signUp.title: Create account
signUp.subtitle: Free for self-hosters. No credit card.
signUp.setupSubtitle: This first account becomes the administrator of this server.
signUp.disabledBody: This server does not accept new accounts. Ask an administrator for an invite.
signUp.verifySubtitle: We sent a 6-digit code to {email}. It expires in 10 minutes.
signUp.librarySubtitle: Tell CourseShelf where your videos live. You can add more libraries later.
signUp.libraryPathHint: An absolute path the server can read, e.g. /srv/courses/cs
signUp.errorPasswordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
signUp.errorVerifyFailed: That code is wrong or has expired. Check it, or request a new one.
signUp.errorLibraryPath: That path could not be registered. Check it exists and is readable.

forgot.title: Reset password
forgot.subtitle: Enter the email on your account and we'll send a reset link. Links expire after 60 minutes.
forgot.sentSubtitle: If {email} matches an account, a reset link is on the way. Didn't get it? Check spam, or wait 60s and request again.
forgot.newPasswordSubtitle: Pick something you'll remember — but not too easy.
forgot.errorTokenMissing: This reset link is missing its token. Request a new link.
forgot.errorPasswordMismatch: The two passwords do not match.
forgot.errorPasswordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
